heading: METHOD OF REPORTING: RETAILERS HAVING SALES BELOW TAXABLE AMOUNT
operative_text: The exclusion provided by Section 151.411 applies to a retailer under this chapter 50 percent of whose receipts from the sales of taxable items comes from individual transactions in which the sales price is an amount on which no tax is produced from the combined state and local taxes.
_note: No defined terms in this section. Cross-reference to §151.411 identified. Enacted by Acts 1987, 70th Leg., ch. 191, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1987.
